mapper.select: select product.id as productId, product.name as productName, product.number as productNumber, product.supplier_id as supplier_id, product.image as productImage, product.is_deleted as productIsDeleted, supplier.name as supplierName, supplier.is_deleted as supplierIsDeleted, stock.id as stockId, stock.stock_quantity from m_product as product left join m_supplier as supplier on product.supplier_id = supplier.id left join t_stock as stock on product.id = stock.product_id where product.is_deleted != 1 order by product.number asc

select product.id as productId, product.name as productName, product.number as productNumber, product.supplier_id as supplierId, product.image as productImage, product.is_deleted as productIsDeleted, supplier.name as supplierName, supplier.furigana as supplierFurigana, supplier.is_deleted as supplierIsDeleted, stock.id as stockId, stock.stock_quantity from m_product as product left join m_supplier as supplier on product.supplier_id = supplier.id left join t_stock as stock on product.id = stock.product_id where product.is_deleted != 1 and( product.name like '%' || #{search} || '%' or product.number like '%' || #{search} || '%' or supplier.name like '%' || #{search} || '%' or supplier.furigana like '%' || #{search} || '%' ) order by product.number ${sort}

select product.id as productId, product.name as productName, product.number as productNumber, product.supplier_id as supplier_id, product.image as productImage, product.is_deleted as productIsDeleted, supplier.name as supplierName, supplier.is_deleted as supplierIsDeleted, stock.id as stockId, stock.stock_quantity from m_product as product left join m_supplier as supplier on product.supplier_id = supplier.id left join t_stock as stock on product.id = stock.product_id where product.id = #{productId} and product.is_deleted != 1
